data.title: TEST: Masonry Cards
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"3-Column Masonry - Full Content","description":"Default 3-column masonry layout with all features: eyebrow, heading, description, two buttons, masonry pattern. Tests staggered row heights with text and image cards, tall cards spanning 3 rows."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"eyebrow":"By The Numbers","heading":"Our Impact at a Glance","description":"See how IGNITE is making a difference across campus through student engagement, partnerships, and community support.","buttons":[{"url":"#","variation":"primary","title":"View Full Report"},{"url":"#","variation":"secondary","title":"Our Story"}],"columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"90%","content":"Student satisfaction rate with IGNITE services and programs."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"20,000","content":"Students served annually across all campuses through events and programs.","isTall":true} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"500+","content":"Student events hosted each academic year."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Community","content":"Building a stronger student community together."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"2-Column Aligned Grid","description":"2-column layout with masonryStyle disabled. Tests aligned row heights (all cards same height) with mixed content types. Tall card toggle is allowed but doesn't affect layout when masonry is off."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"eyebrow":"Our Services","heading":"Student Support Programs","description":"Explore the wide range of services available to support your academic journey.","columnCount":2,"masonryStyle":false} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"85%","content":"Students report improved wellbeing after accessing mental health resources."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":17,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Career Development","content":"Comprehensive career support from resume building to job placement assistance.","isTall":true} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"300+","content":"Workshop sessions delivered annually on academic skills and career readiness."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"4-Column Masonry","description":"4-column layout with masonry pattern enabled. Tests complex staggered pattern across desktop (4 cols), tablet (3 cols), and mobile (2 cols) breakpoints."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Student Achievements","description":"Celebrating success stories from our student community.","columnCount":4,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"A+","content":"Academic excellence award recipients."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"75%","content":"Students who complete co-op placements."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.3,"y":0.7}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"300+","content":"Club memberships across campus."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Growth","content":"Year-over-year increase in program participation."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.7,"y":0.3}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Partnership Network","content":"Connecting students with industry leaders and employers."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"99%","content":"Student event attendance satisfaction rate."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"3-Column Aligned Grid - No Buttons","description":"3-column aligned layout without masonry effect. Tests that all cards align in equal-height rows. No eyebrow or buttons, only heading and description."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Key Statistics","description":"Core metrics that demonstrate our commitment to student success.","columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":false} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Test","content":"No eyebrow or buttons example with short title."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Another Card","content":"With medium title length testing row alignment."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Final","content":"Short title card to complete the row."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Minimal Content","description":"Only required fields populated (no heading, eyebrow, description, or buttons). Tests shouldDisplay behavior - only card grid should render with aria-label fallback on section."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Minimal","content":"Only cards, no header content."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Test","content":"Testing empty header state."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content Edge Case","description":"Edge case with very long eyebrow (50+ chars), heading (100+ chars), description (250+ chars), and long button labels. Tests overflow handling and text wrapping in header area."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"eyebrow":"This Is An Intentionally Very Long Eyebrow Text To Test How The Layout Handles Overflow","heading":"This Is An Extremely Long Heading That Tests How The Masonry Cards Block Handles Very Long Content In The Heading Area And Maintains Proper Layout Structure","description":"Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Suspendisse varius enim in eros elementum tristique. Duis cursus, mi quis viverra ornare, eros dolor interdum nulla, ut commodo diam libero vitae erat. Aenean faucibus nibh et justo cursus id rutrum lorem imperdiet. Nunc ut sem vitae risus tristique posuere.","buttons":[{"url":"#","variation":"primary","title":"This Is A Very Long Button Label That Tests Overflow"},{"url":"#","variation":"secondary","title":"Another Long Button"}],"columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Card with extremely long title that tests text wrapping and overflow behavior in masonry grid layout","content":"This description is intentionally very long to test how text cards handle large amounts of content within the masonry layout system."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Tall Cards in Masonry","description":"Tests tall card functionality (isTall attribute) in masonry mode. Tall cards span 3 rows with split background (top/bottom halves) on desktop. Mixed with regular cards and images."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"eyebrow":"Featured","heading":"Spotlight on Student Success","description":"Highlighting the achievements and stories that inspire our community.","buttons":[{"url":"#","variation":"primary","title":"Read All Stories"}],"columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Award Winner","content":"This tall card demonstrates the 3-row span behavior with split background effect.","isTall":true} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"95%","content":"Regular height card alongside tall card."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Excellence","content":"Another regular card in the pattern."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Innovation Hub","content":"Second tall card to test multiple tall cards in same grid.","isTall":true} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":17,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"All Image Cards - 2 Column","description":"Grid composed entirely of image cards in 2-column aligned layout. Tests that images render correctly without text cards, maintains aspect ratios, and respects focal points."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Photo Gallery","description":"A collection of moments from campus life.","columnCount":2,"masonryStyle":false} -->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":17,"focalPoint":{"x":0.3,"y":0.7}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.7,"y":0.3}}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"All Text Cards - 4 Column Masonry","description":"Grid composed entirely of text cards in 4-column masonry. Tests title size logic (text-header-1 for ≤10 chars, text-header-3 for \u003e10 chars) and varied content lengths."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Quick Facts","columnCount":4,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"A","content":"Single character title (text-header-1 size)."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Ten Chars!","content":"Exactly 10 characters (text-header-1)."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Eleven Chars","content":"11 characters triggers text-header-3."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"100+","content":"Short title under threshold."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Community Programs","content":"Medium length title over 10 chars."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"75%","content":"Another short title."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Success Rate","content":"Two-word title over threshold."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"99","content":"Numeric short title."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Single Card","description":"Edge case with only one card. Tests that grid layout doesn't break with minimal content and card renders at correct width."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Single Item","columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Only Card","content":"Testing single card in masonry grid."} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Custom Focal Points","description":"Image cards with varied focal points. Tests that object-position CSS correctly applies focal point coordinates (x: 0.3/y: 0.7 top-left emphasis, x: 0.7/y: 0.3 bottom-right emphasis)."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"heading":"Image Focal Points","description":"Demonstrating focal point positioning on images.","columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":false} -->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.3,"y":0.3}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":17,"focalPoint":{"x":0.7,"y":0.7}}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Responsive Breakpoints Test","description":"3-column masonry testing responsive behavior: mobile (1 col stacked), sm (2 col masonry pattern 2,1,1,2), md/lg (3 col pattern 1,2,1,2,1,2). Includes mix of cards to demonstrate pattern at each breakpoint."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/masonry-cards {"eyebrow":"Responsive Design","heading":"Cross-Device Layout","description":"This variation demonstrates how the masonry pattern adapts across mobile, tablet, and desktop.","columnCount":3,"masonryStyle":true} -->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Mobile","content":"Stacked single column on small screens."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Tablet","content":"2-column masonry at sm breakpoint."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Desktop","content":"3-column masonry at md+ breakpoint."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":19,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/text-card {"title":"Adaptive","content":"Layout automatically adjusts to viewport."} /-->
<!-- wp:takt/image-card {"image":{"id":18,"focalPoint":{"x":0.5,"y":0.5}}} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/masonry-cards -->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
